markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Raphael Collignon vs Flavio Cobolli professional tennis match in the 2026 ATP Miami Round Of 64. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks). If a retirement occurs, all markets that can be unconditionally settled based on play already completed will resolve accordingly.
